items.title: Rohit in the spotlight with series on the line at Lord's
items.summary: The series is level 1-1 after England's triumph in Cardiff, and they have not beaten India in a bilateral ODI series since 2018
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: How to Watch Mbappe and France vs. England: TV Channel, Live Stream, Live
items.summary: France and Kylian Mbappé face England in the World Cup third-place match Saturday. Here's the time, TV channel and how to watch or stream on FOX.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
